EERIE.Name: Name
EERIE.CondFatigue.Name: Fatigue
EERIE.CondFatigue.Desc: You are exhausted. -1 to all rolls.
EERIE.CondExhaustion.Name: Exhaustion
EERIE.CondInjury.Name: Injury
EERIE.CondInjury.Desc: Each action deals 1 damage to BODY.
EERIE.CondUncertainty.Name: Uncertainty
EERIE.CondApathy.Name: Apathy
EERIE.CondBroken.Name: Broken
EERIE.CondBroken.Desc: Each action deals 1 damage to MIND.
EERIE.TraitBreakthrough.Name: Breakthrough
EERIE.TraitBreakthrough.Desc: You force your way through debris, break down doors, or push through crowds with increased effectiveness.
EERIE.TraitJustAScratch.Name: Just a Scratch
EERIE.TraitJustAScratch.Desc: You can block up to 2 Body damage at once by spending 2 Will.
EERIE.TraitThickSkin.Name: Thick Skin
EERIE.TraitThickSkin.Desc: You can ignore pain. All Body checks related to pain gain +1d.
EERIE.TraitHighPainThreshold.Name: High Pain Threshold
EERIE.TraitHighPainThreshold.Desc: When damage would kill you or remove you from the scene, you may lose 1 Mind instead and remain conscious.
EERIE.TraitOnslaught.Name: Onslaught
EERIE.TraitOnslaught.Desc: In melee, spend 1 Will to knock a target prone without a check. All actions against that target gain either +1d or increased effectiveness.
EERIE.TraitDirtyTrick.Name: Dirty Trick
EERIE.TraitDirtyTrick.Desc: When you take Body damage in melee, make a Body check. On any success, deal the same amount of damage to the attacker. On a 6, you also ignore the damage.
EERIE.TraitEvasion.Name: Evasion
EERIE.TraitEvasion.Desc: When you are attacked, you may spend 1 Will to make a quick dodge. On any success, you completely avoid the damage.
EERIE.TraitDash.Name: Dash
EERIE.TraitDash.Desc: Actions involving movement on foot have increased effectiveness.
EERIE.TraitUnbreakable.Name: Unbreakable
EERIE.TraitUnbreakable.Desc: Body damage cannot exceed 3, and you may block it by spending an equal amount of Will.
EERIE.TraitInsight.Name: Insight
EERIE.TraitInsight.Desc: When cracking a password, deciphering a code, or understanding a complex structure, make a Mind check. On a 6, recover 1 Will. On a failure, take 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.TraitSharedFear.Name: Shared Fear
EERIE.TraitSharedFear.Desc: When someone nearby takes Mind damage, your next action gains +1d.
EERIE.TraitForesight.Name: Foresight
EERIE.TraitForesight.Desc: When someone is about to act, predict the outcome aloud. If you're correct, recover 1 Will and 1 Mind. Anyone who heard you takes 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.TraitSixthSense.Name: Sixth Sense
EERIE.TraitSixthSense.Desc: You may ignore any unexpected damage without spending Will, as long as you have at least 1 Will remaining.
EERIE.TraitPlanning.Name: Planning
EERIE.TraitPlanning.Desc: Propose a rational solution to a problem. You and anyone who agrees to follow your plan gain +1d on your next action.
EERIE.TraitPreparedness.Name: Preparedness
EERIE.TraitPreparedness.Desc: Spend 1 Will to pull an ordinary but useful item from your pocket.
EERIE.TraitDeduction.Name: Deduction
EERIE.TraitDeduction.Desc: When drawing conclusions, make a Mind check. On a 6, ask the GM two questions related to the check. On a 1–5, ask one. On a failure, take 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.TraitComposure.Name: Composure
EERIE.TraitComposure.Desc: Help someone overcome fear or panic. Spend 1 Will and make a Mind check. On a 6, the target recovers 2 Will. On a 4–5, they recover 1 Will.
EERIE.TraitMindBodyBalance.Name: Mind–Body Balance
EERIE.TraitMindBodyBalance.Desc: Spend 1 Will to move 1 point between Body and Mind, up to the maximum value.
EERIE.FeatCruelty.Name: Cruelty
EERIE.FeatCruelty.Desc: When you commit a cruel physical act, gain 1 Will. Anyone who witnesses it must make a Mind check.
EERIE.FeatImmunity.Name: Immunity
EERIE.FeatImmunity.Desc: As long as your Body is unharmed and above 0, Body damage is reduced by 1. If your Body is injured, Mind damage also deals 1 Body damage.
EERIE.FeatAdrenaline.Name: Adrenaline
EERIE.FeatAdrenaline.Desc: When you take damage, spend 1 Will to make your next action have increased effectiveness.
EERIE.FeatCombatReflexes.Name: Combat Reflexes
EERIE.FeatCombatReflexes.Desc: You may use Body instead of Mind for ranged attacks.
EERIE.FeatPrecision.Name: Precision
EERIE.FeatPrecision.Desc: You may spend 1 Will to make your next shot deal +2 damage. On a 6, recover 1 Will.
EERIE.FeatOnTheEdge.Name: On the Edge
EERIE.FeatOnTheEdge.Desc: When your Body is at or below 0, the effectiveness of your ranged attacks cannot be reduced.
EERIE.FeatDealWithMe.Name: Deal With Me
EERIE.FeatDealWithMe.Desc: You may spend 1 Will to take Body damage intended for a nearby character.
EERIE.FeatRevival.Name: Revival
EERIE.FeatRevival.Desc: You may spend 1 Will to bring a character removed from the scene back to consciousness without a Mind check.
EERIE.FeatMotivation.Name: Motivation
EERIE.FeatMotivation.Desc: When someone fails a check, you may spend 1 Will to let them immediately reroll it.
EERIE.FeatFieldMedicine.Name: Field Medicine
EERIE.FeatFieldMedicine.Desc: When providing first aid, make a check. On a 6, the target recovers 3 Body. On a 4–5, they recover 2 Body. On a failure, they take 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.FeatJuryRigger.Name: Jury-Rigger
EERIE.FeatJuryRigger.Desc: Improvised tools and weapons have increased effectiveness. On a 6, recover 1 Will. On a failure, the item breaks and deals 1 damage to you.
EERIE.FeatRepair.Name: Repair
EERIE.FeatRepair.Desc: When repairing something, make a Mind check. On a 6, recover 1 Mind and 1 Will. On a failure, take 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.FeatFaith.Name: Faith
EERIE.FeatFaith.Desc: When your Mind is below its maximum, perform an act of faith. On a 6, fully restore your Mind. On a failure, take 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.FeatTrial.Name: Trial
EERIE.FeatTrial.Desc: When you take Body damage, you may recover 1 Will by accepting it as a spiritual trial.
EERIE.FeatPacifism.Name: Pacifism
EERIE.FeatPacifism.Desc: When you witness violence, take 1 Mind damage. Your next check gains +1d and increased effectiveness.
EERIE.FeatLogicOverFear.Name: Logic over fear
EERIE.FeatLogicOverFear.Desc: When you take Mind damage, spend 1 Will to understand the source of the horror. Make a Mind check. On a 6, ignore the damage completely.
EERIE.FeatInnerFire.Name: Inner Fire
EERIE.FeatInnerFire.Desc: While at 0 Will, your checks gain +1d. On a 6, recover 1 Will. On a failure, you lose control and take 1 Body or Mind damage.
EERIE.FeatIronWill.Name: Iron Will
EERIE.FeatIronWill.Desc: When damage would kill you or remove you from the scene, make the appropriate check with +1d. On any success, you remain conscious. On a 6, also recover 1 Will.
EERIE.FeatMerryFellow.Name: Merry Fellow
EERIE.FeatMerryFellow.Desc: When trying to lift someone's spirits, spend 1 Will and make a Mind check. On a 6, everyone who hears you gains +1d on their next check.
EERIE.FeatEncouragement.Name: Encouragement
EERIE.FeatEncouragement.Desc: Spend 1 Will to encourage another character. Their next Mind check has increased effectiveness. If they fail it, you take 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.FeatThisWontAffectMe.Name: This won’t affect me
EERIE.FeatThisWontAffectMe.Desc: When someone nearby takes Mind damage, your next check has increased effectiveness.
EERIE.FeatDontTrust.Name: Don’t Trust
EERIE.FeatDontTrust.Desc: Actions you perform alone gain +1d. If you act in the presence of others and fail, take 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.FeatPawnsOnTheBoard.Name: Pawns on the Board
EERIE.FeatPawnsOnTheBoard.Desc: If you know another character's Solace, spend 1 Will to order them to do something. If they resist, they must spend 1 Will or make a Mind check. On a 6, your command has no effect.
EERIE.FeatListenToMe.Name: Listen to Me
EERIE.FeatListenToMe.Desc: Spend 1 Will to give someone advice or tell them how to act. If they follow it, their next check gains +1d. If they ignore it and take damage, recover 1 Will.
EERIE.FeatIronVow.Name: Iron Vow
EERIE.FeatIronVow.Desc: When you make someone a promise, spend 1 Will to give your next related check increased effectiveness. If you break the promise, take 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.FeatFollower.Name: Follower
EERIE.FeatFollower.Desc: When following someone's instructions and taking Mind damage, spend 1 Will to ignore any amount of that damage. If you take Body damage instead, also take 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.FeatLeadMe.Name: Lead Me
EERIE.FeatLeadMe.Desc: Spend 1 Will to ask another character what you should do. Your next action has increased effectiveness. On a failure, take 1 Mind damage.
EERIE.Solace-1-1: Solace: A small object that is interesting to look at.
EERIE.Solace-1-2: Solace: A photo or image of a loved one or a familiar place.
EERIE.Solace-1-3: Solace: A deck of playing or collectible cards.
EERIE.Solace-1-4: Solace: A light source — a candle, flashlight, or matches.
EERIE.Solace-1-5: Solace: Creative expression — drawing symbols or sketches.
EERIE.Solace-1-6: Solace: Observing familiar objects in the environment.
EERIE.Solace-2-1: Solace: A music box, small instrument, or portable player.
EERIE.Solace-2-2: Solace: Calm self-talk spoken out loud.
EERIE.Solace-2-4: Solace: The sound of people laughing.
EERIE.Solace-2-5: Solace: Tapping out a familiar rhythm.
EERIE.Solace-2-6: Solace: Listening to familiar sounds in the environment.
EERIE.Solace-3-1: Solace: A vial of aroma oil or a pouch of herbs.
EERIE.Solace-3-4: Solace: The smell of favorite food.
EERIE.Solace-3-6: Solace: Noticing familiar scents in the environment.
EERIE.Solace-4-1: Solace: A small object that feels pleasant to touch.
EERIE.Solace-4-3: Solace: Repetitive mechanical interaction with an object.
EERIE.Solace-4-4: Solace: Fabric or an item with a comforting texture.
EERIE.Solace-4-6: Solace: Applying physical force to something until it breaks.
EERIE.Solace-6-1: Solace: Meditation or breathing exercises in silence.
EERIE.Solace-6-3: Solace: Keeping a journal or notes.
EERIE.Solace-6-5: Solace: Memories of home, loved ones, or pleasant events.
EERIE.Solace-6-6: Solace: Mental tasks that require concentration.
EERIE.Quirk-2-1: A quiet voice, almost a whisper
EERIE.Quirk-3-2: Always fidgeting with something in their hands
EERIE.Quirk-3-4: Sweats constantly, even in the cold
EERIE.Quirk-3-5: Moves in an oddly unnatural way
EERIE.Quirk-4-3: Frequently looks around, as if on edge
EERIE.Quirk-4-5: Always wears gloves, even in heat
EERIE.Quirk-4-6: Bites their lips until they bleed
EERIE.Quirk-5-1: Refers to themselves in the third person
EERIE.Quirk-5-3: Strong smell of tobacco or alcohol
EERIE.Quirk-5-4: Speech filled with strange words or quotes
EERIE.Quirk-6-4: Keeps hands in pockets, even while talking
EERIE.SettingsCritReliefHint: If enabled, a Critical Success restores +1 Will and Mind (up to maximum).
EERIE.SettingsPersonalityChatHint: Whether to post the personality generation results to the public chat.
EERIE.SettingsTrackerHint: Show ticks tracker on the item
EERIE.SettingsInitiativeHint: A failed check grants disadvantage until the next successful check. RMB on Stat for reset
EERIE.SettingsAdvRollHint: Unlocks the advanced roll menu for inventory items.
EERIE.AdvRoll1Hint: Grants an additional tick to the success result.
EERIE.AdvRoll2Hint: Grants 2 additional ticks to the success result.
EERIE.AdvRollDepleteHint: Completely depletes the item's resource, applying each rolled success.
EERIE.AdvRollPreciseHint: Allows rerolls at the cost of Will.
